assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased rollout: dev first, then staging, then prod
assertions.reason: Clearly defines Phase 1 (Dev), Phase 2 (Staging), Phase 3 (Production) with explicit sequencing

assertions.expectation: Includes soak time between environment phases (e.g., 24-48 hours for dev, 1 week for staging before prod)
assertions.reason: Specifies 24h soak time for dev, 48h for staging, and 1 week for production clusters

assertions.expectation: Defines go/no-go criteria between phases (error rates, latency, pod health)
assertions.reason: Includes validation gates with specific criteria: application health checks, integration tests for dev; regression suite and performance benchmarks for staging; business acceptance and traffic validation for prod

assertions.expectation: Addresses version availability differences across channels (1.30 may be on Rapid but not yet on Stable)
assertions.reason: Includes detailed version availability timeline table showing when 1.30 will be available on each channel, and explicitly mentions waiting for availability before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading sequentially within each environment (1.28→1.29→1.30)
assertions.reason: Explicitly states 'Sequential minors (1.28 → 1.29 → 1.30)' and shows this path in all environment phases

assertions.expectation: Suggests not upgrading all prod clusters simultaneously — do one or two first as canary
assertions.reason: Shows sequential upgrade pattern 'Prod-1 → Prod-2 → Prod-3 → Prod-4' with 1 week soak between clusters

assertions.expectation: Includes rollback triggers and criteria for halting the rollout
assertions.reason: Provides 'Break Glass Scenarios' section with specific triggers and 'Risk Mitigation' section detailing when to pause rollout

assertions.expectation: Provides a timeline or schedule estimate for the full rollout
assertions.reason: Includes detailed timeline with Week 1 for dev, Week 2-3 for staging, Week 4-6 for prod, totaling ~6 weeks

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance window coordination across clusters
assertions.reason: Includes 'Maintenance Windows & Exclusions' section with specific gcloud commands and configuration examples for setting maintenance windows
